xp.rule: Teen: +5 partial, +10 full with honest intensity and logged results. Youth: max +5, coach-led.

loggingRule.note: Athlete logs best working set per lift or best round for HIIT. Coach can request full logs later.

intensityRule: Last 3 reps should be hard but clean. No ego reps and no ugly form.

format.note: Partner-friendly. Alternate sets as rest. Solo: superset or rest 60 to 120 seconds.

retestRule.note: Session 40 repeats Session 1 exactly for comparison.
